name: Linter panel opens and shows real-time diagnostics
description: When the user opens the linter/diagnostics panel in the editor view, the panel slides open showing real-time diagnostic results (either issues found or a clean-code message).

planSteps.description: Verify the editor view is active with the code editor visible
Click the linter/diagnostics toggle button in the editor toolbar (look for a button with a bug icon)
Verify a side panel slides open on the right side of the editor
Verify the panel has two tab options at the top (real-time check and AI analysis)
Verify the panel shows either a list of diagnostic issues or a clean-code confirmation message
